name: @fsman/node
description: TypeScript API for loading, validating, and resolving fsman manifests

scripts.build: npm run build:native && npm run build:typescript
scripts.build:native: cargo-cp-artifact -ac fsman-node index.node -- cargo build -p fsman-node --message-format=json-render-diagnostics
scripts.build:native:release: cargo-cp-artifact -ac fsman-node index.node -- cargo build --release -p fsman-node --message-format=json-render-diagnostics
scripts.prepack: npm run build:native:release && npm run build:typescript
